$comment: Repo-local config for the spec/dev/qa/ship board sweeps. Nothing in the skills is hardcoded; they read this file.
$comment_runtime: Scheduled sweep runtime selection. Prefer runtimes.<sweep> for per-stage dispatch. Legacy runtime + models remain as a fallback when runtimes.<sweep> is absent. Each scheduled stage may declare one singular, optional Claude fallback: it runs only after positively classified Codex personal/model usage exhaustion. Workspace credits/spend caps and every generic failure fail closed. Claude must be installed and authenticated on the runner. The review entry is a reviewer role preference for sweep instructions, not a scheduled stage.
$comment_parallel: Bounded workspace parallelism, same-repo per-card fan-out, mid-batch same-repo refill, and bounded drain-after-dispatch. maxNonShipDispatches counts selected non-Ship workspace/sweep candidates and caps follow-up handoff dispatches per parent tick; Ship is one child per source workspace and may coexist with every stage. sameRepoCardLimits counts active child slots inside each selected non-Ship candidate; maxSameRepoRefillDispatches clamps 0..20 and caps same-repo child slots backfilled after successful child completion. maxHandoffTriggerHops controls immediate spec->dev/dev->qa follow-ups for the same card; 0 disables. maxDrainPasses is clamped to 1..5. Ship is never handoff-triggered.
$comment_learning: Dogfood the Factory Learning Loop in this workspace. The registry runner remains machine-local; generated cards require normal QA, Signoff, and human Ship approval.
$comment_reviewLenses: Card-type gating for review lenses: a card carrying any of a lens's labels fires that lens.
$comment_requireShipApproval: Optional. When true, ship-sweep requires a human-applied `ship:approved` label in addition to the card being in 'Ship' before it will merge.
$comment_fastPath: Enabled by default. Dev-sweep may mark tiny, high-confidence, low-risk changes with `fast-path:eligible`; a human can then move the card from QA directly to Ship to skip Signoff. Set enabled to false to require normal Signoff for every card. ship-sweep still merges only from human-moved Ship.
deploy: No production app deploy for this kit. Shipping is merge/push to main; any release publishing or external distribution step must be attended by the owner or tracked as a Todo card.
credentialsNote: Linear API key in gitignored .env; no app secrets are required for this repo.
